title: PAN-OS - Block IPs From EDL - Custom Block Rule
content:
This playbook blocks IP addresses from External Dynamic List using Custom Block Rules in Palo Alto Networks Panorama or Firewall. The playbook receives EDL name as input, creates a custom "from" directional rule to block, and commits the configuration.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PAN-OS, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — RuleName: Panorama rule name; EDLName: EDL IPs to block; AutoCommit: This input establishes whether to commit the configuration automatically.
Yes - Commit automatically.
No - Commit manually.; LogForwarding: Panorama log forwarding object name.

Integrations/scripts used: pan-os-commit, pan-os-custom-block-rule.
